---
title: "ddclient not working."
date: 2012-09-12
forum: Server Platforms
---

### Post by donniezazen on 2012-09-12
Hello,

I just setup a new server. I am unable to make ddclient work with DynDNS.

My Configuration
```

 # Configuration file for ddclient generated by debconf
 #
 # /etc/ddclient.conf
 #
 # Check the current IP address. Either check the eth0 port for its current IP address (can't be used on a LAN),
 # or use the DynDNS IP checking service.
 daemon=3600
 pid=/var/run/ddclient.pid
 #use=if, if=eth0
 use=web, web=checkip.dyndns.com/, web-skip='IP Address'
 #
 # Login and change the values at the DynDNS site, using SSL.
 protocol=dyndns2
 ssl=yes
 server=members.dyndns.org
 login= My Username
 password=My Password
 Myhost.dyndns.org
```

Debug
```

```

It won't stop after giving stop command.
```
donnie@donnie-server:~$ sudo /etc/init.d/ddclient stop
donnie@donnie-server:~$ sudo /etc/init.d/ddclient status
Status of Dynamic DNS service update utility: ddclient is running.
```

Thanks.
